title: dubautia paleata
intro: Dubautia paleata, also known as the 'Ma'o hau hele' or Yellow Hibiscus, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. The health benefits of Dubautia paleata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable plant for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in modern herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
